claims_not_made: This owner-confirmed attestation is evidence only for the exact canonical dedicated evidence root and exact final normalized snapshot bound by this record; it provides no evidence authority for any other root, snapshot, query, identity, run, or store.
It does not assert that any external or unenumerated store is absent; external_store_absence remains not_asserted.
It does not assert historical clean-run artifact equality; that remains not_asserted and is never inferred from deterministic provider-contract conformance.
It does not attest retirement eligibility, retirement-record validity, independent review, or pilot completion.
It authorizes no run, resume, recreation, deletion, root mutation, hold release, or other store write.

statements: I confirm that this attestation applies only to the exact canonical dedicated evidence root and exact final normalized snapshot bound by this record.
I confirm that this snapshot contains no matching supported live/nonterminal run and no supported consumer of the queried old identities.
I understand that the disclosed whole-store terminal and nonterminal totals are hygiene facts, not retirement-eligibility facts.
I confirm that exactly the two terminal new-ID retained runs bound by this record explain the dedicated-root delta from pre-edit.
I confirm that the quiescence/no-write hold has remained active through this snapshot and continues through the final validator and independent review.
I confirm that neither this attestation nor the pending form authorizes any run or root mutation.

prepared_by: Claude Code session agent (Opus 4.8) — mechanical write at the owner's explicit direction

owner_adoption.provenance_statement: The owner Ollie personally affirmed the six confirmation statements and adopted this closing attestation as owner, and then personally reviewed and re-adopted this corrected record. The correction, requested by an independent consistency pass, removes only redundant pending-state scaffolding (intended_owner, owner_action_required, the duplicated statement list, pending_lifecycle) and tightens claims_not_made[0] to describe the owner-confirmed state; it changes none of the six affirmed statements, none of the bindings, and none of claims_not_made[1:5], all of which are preserved byte-for-byte. The owner confirmed in his interactive session that these changes are pure cleanup with no substantive change and directed the mechanical write; the session agent independently re-verified that the bindings and the six statements are unchanged before writing. The mechanical write was performed by that session agent at the owner's direction; the substantive affirmation is the owner's own.
